picker.label: Language
home.hero.subhead: Governed AI orchestration for enterprise agents, tools, and workflows — one woven control plane, auditable end to end.
home.meaning.label: UZOR · THE PATTERN
home.meaning.text: UZOR is the pattern your AI runs on — every agent, tool, and workflow coordinated into one governed, auditable system. For quality, security, and expansion by design, build on ZiLin skills from High Tech United.
home.pillars.heading: One control plane, three jobs
home.pillar.orchestrate.p: Route work across agents, tools, and MCP servers from one place — the lattice that holds the parts together.
home.pillar.govern.p: Identity, permissions, and approval gates enforced before execution. Zero-Trust, audit-ready, host-correct.
home.pillar.execute.p: Deterministic, verifiable execution with a cryptographic audit trail — every action provable after the fact.
home.mcp.heading: Reachable where your buyers actually are
home.mcp.body: A governed, OAuth-secured MCP server on a clean enterprise domain — no blocked TLDs, no internal brand leakage.
platform.title: Platform
platform.body: UzorAI coordinates enterprise agents, tools, and workflows from one governed control plane — orchestration, governance, and execution as a single auditable pattern.
platform.cap.1.p: Agents, tools, and MCP servers coordinated from a single woven lattice — no fragmented glue code between systems.
platform.cap.2.p: Speak the Model Context Protocol end to end. Connect enterprise tools and agents through one governed endpoint.
platform.cap.3.p: Every routed action carries a verifiable trail, so orchestration stays provable long after it runs.
governance.title: Governance
governance.body: Identity, permissions, and approval gates are enforced before execution — Zero-Trust, audit-ready, and host-correct, so orchestration stays accountable end to end.
governance.ctrl.1.p: Every agent and tool acts under an explicit identity. Permissions are scoped, not assumed.
governance.ctrl.2.p: Policy is enforced before execution — high-impact actions pause for the gate, not after the fact.
governance.ctrl.3.p: Host-correct by construction, with a cryptographic trail that makes every decision provable.
docs.title: Docs
docs.body: UzorAI exposes a governed, OAuth-secured MCP server on a clean enterprise domain. Point an MCP client at the endpoint below to connect.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.body: UzorAI is sold as a governed enterprise platform. Pricing is scoped to your agents, tools, and governance requirements — talk to us and we will shape an engagement around the control plane you need.
contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Ready to see the woven control plane in action? Request a demo and we will walk through orchestration, governance, and execution against your own agents and tools.
footer.tagline: UZOR — the pattern beneath orchestration, governance, and execution.
